acceptance.criterion: New regression test proves exact-value redaction still fires for a secret-named env var with a >=8-char value (old behavior preserved)
acceptance.evidence: RunGateTests.test_gate_still_redacts_minimum_length_secret_named_env_values (tests/test_cobbler_agents_implement.py): an exactly-8-char CUSTOM_GATE_TOKEN value printed by the gate child appears as [REDACTED:exact_grant] in the returned record and in persisted gates/batch-13.json. Collector unit tests in tests/test_cobbler_agents_dispatch.py (ContextRedactionTests.test_collect_secret_env_values_*) pin the 8-char boundary both ways. Commit 5729f97; revert-check confirmed the corruption-direction tests fail on pre-fix source while this one passes.

acceptance.criterion: Exactly one env-derived exact-secret collector remains; both call sites import it
acceptance.evidence: grep: def collect_secret_env_values exists only at scripts/cobbler_runtime/context.py:238 (MIN_EXACT_SECRET_VALUE_LENGTH=8); implement.py _inherited_secret_values and cobbler_agents.py _secret_env_values are deleted; both modules import the collector (implement.py:30, cobbler_agents.py:76) and every env-derived exact_values feed calls it (implement.py:2278; cobbler_agents.py:157,240,251,264,1219,1489). Grant-derived exact values (implement.py exact_grants, worker verified_grant_values) remain separate by design. Commit 5729f97.

acceptance.criterion: Fixture tests prove gc refuses: dirty worktree, unmerged branch, unpushed commits, current directory, main worktree, unregistered sibling directory
acceptance.evidence: tests/test_worktree_gc.py (real tempfile fixture repos with a file:// origin): test_refuses_dirty_tracked_worktree, test_refuses_worktree_with_untracked_file, test_refuses_unmerged_branch, test_refuses_clean_but_unpushed_worktree, test_refuses_worktree_ahead_of_upstream_even_when_merged (isolates the ahead-of-upstream clause: tip merged into origin/main but upstream behind), test_refuses_invoking_directory, test_refuses_main_and_invoking_worktrees_even_with_apply, test_refuses_locked_worktree, test_refuses_detached_head_worktree, test_unregistered_sibling_directory_listed_never_deleted (sibling listed operator-owned, survives --apply). Tests pinned first as failing contract at 726cfe5; helper passes them at f10e202. Focused run: python3 -m unittest tests.test_worktree_gc tests.test_preflight_sh tests.test_preflight_worktree -> Ran 43 tests OK.

acceptance.criterion: Fixture test proves gc removes a clean merged worktree and deletes its local branch, and `git worktree list` no longer shows it
acceptance.evidence: test_apply_removes_clean_merged_worktree_and_branch: --apply prints 'removed worktree <path>; deleted branch codex/merged', directory gone, git worktree list --porcelain no longer contains the path, git branch --list codex/merged empty, while an unmerged keeper worktree and its branch survive. Wrapper parity: test_preflight_sh.py test_preflight_gc_worktrees_apply_removes_merged_worktree_via_wrapper (./scripts/preflight.sh --gc-worktrees --apply). Partial-failure registry consistency: test_apply_reports_branch_delete_refusal_and_keeps_registry_consistent (worktree deregistered, branch kept, exit 1, never -D). Commit f10e202.

acceptance.criterion: Report mode performs zero mutations (asserted on fixture repo state)
acceptance.evidence: test_report_mode_performs_zero_mutations: fixture zoo (removable candidate, dirty, unmerged, prunable registration, unregistered sibling); before/after snapshots of git worktree list --porcelain + git for-each-ref + parent directory listing compare equal after a default (report) run, prunable entry still registered, candidate and sibling directories still exist. Prune gating: test_apply_without_successful_removals_does_not_prune and test_apply_prunes_registrations_only_after_successful_removal. Report path issues only read-only git commands; the dirty probe uses git --no-optional-locks status --porcelain. Commit f10e202.

acceptance.criterion: Dogfood evidence: the five merged elves worktrees removed; the five unmerged benchmark worktrees and all unregistered siblings untouched and listed in the report
acceptance.evidence: Driver dogfood 2026-07-16 ~15:10 from main checkout /Users/john/aigora/dev/elves via worktree_gc.py (report then --apply): removed 5 merged worktrees (elves-delegated-worker-v2-1, elves-devin-cli-worker, elves-faster-goal-runs, elves-grok-build-open-source, elves-joyful-elves-runs) and deleted their local branches (git branch --list of all five returns empty); refused with reasons: main+invoking checkout, 5 unmerged benchmark worktrees (2 also unpushed), this run's worktree (not merged); 4 unregistered siblings listed operator-owned and untouched; git worktree list post-state shows main + 5 benchmarks + run worktree only. Transcript in execution log B2 reconcile.
